         epoch_loss = 0.0

+            bsz = noisy.size(0)

             with torch.no_grad():

-            out = adapter(enhanced)

-

-            l1_loss = F.l1_loss(out, clean)

+

+            loss = l1_loss(enhanced, clean)

             optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)

             loss.backward()

             optimizer.step()
